items: Create a new character and start a fresh survival scenario or save
Perform opening triage after spawning: collect nearest essentials, check oxygen/food, establish safe direction
Build a tiny starter base with a core, generator, fuel, and a protected interior
Flatten a patch of ground for building using terrain tools before placing structures
Dig a short tunnel or bunker entrance and use it as temporary shelter
Add cargo storage and linked logistics so gathered materials can be pulled into crafting without manual juggling
Add solar panels and battery/capacitor support to a base if available
Use terrain deformation to create a trench, berm, or covered entry for defense
Gain enough XP to unlock the first tech-tree item, then immediately craft or place it
Place a portable constructor and craft the first survival tools, ammo, or basic components
Mine surface rocks for common starter ores in one efficient gathering loop
Use a detector/drill to locate and mine a buried ore deposit underground
Salvage components from a wreck, POI, or abandoned structure and bring them home
Harvest plant fibers, wood/biomass, and animal-derived resources in one mixed route
Run a full constructor workflow: ore to ingots, ingots to components, components to a finished item
Deconstruct or recycle an unwanted item and reuse the recovered parts
Plant a small crop plot or hydroponic setup and harvest the output later
Catch or collect an aquatic food source if available, then process it for food
Use the food processor or cooking station to convert raw ingredients into a prepared meal or medicine
Place an HV starter, finish a simple hover vehicle, and drive it over rough ground
Refuel, repair, and restock a damaged HV or other vehicle after a trip
Upgrade a vehicle with storage, harvest, or weapon modules and immediately test the change
Place an SV starter, finish a small vessel, and perform a clean takeoff and landing
Fly from the surface of a planet into orbit in a single uninterrupted clip
Mine asteroid resources or space junk in orbit and store the materials in your ship
Warp to another planet or star system and exit at a new destination
Land on a different planet with noticeably different gravity, atmosphere, or terrain
Place or board a capital vessel and manage onboard systems like fuel, cargo, or constructors
Dock or park a smaller craft at a base, station, or capital vessel and move items between them
Loot a hostile POI carefully without triggering full combat immediately
Clear a small POI using ranged weapons from cover
Use melee on a weak creature or drone to conserve ammunition
Hunt wildlife for food and materials, then process the results back at base
Defend against a drone or base attack while using cover and base structures to survive
Approach a hostile area at night or with a low-profile route before engaging enemies
Use explosives or breaching tools against clustered enemies or structural weak points
Engage in ship-to-ship combat using mounted weapons if the save is progressed enough
Prepare for a hazardous planet by equipping the right armor, meds, oxygen, and food before departure
Recover from a negative survival state such as low oxygen, radiation, cold, or injury
Compare exploration on two different biome types in one session
Visit a planetary or orbital trader and buy one useful item or component
Sell mined, farmed, or crafted goods to a trader and compare value against raw materials
Progress a dialogue or quest objective in Robinson Protocol or another scenario questline
Swim across water to reach a shoreline resource node or loot target
Dive or enter deeper water to retrieve underwater resources or loot if available
Use the map/scanner to locate a specific POI or resource deposit, then travel to it
Spawn or load a blueprint, place it, and customize or repair part of the design
Paint, texture, or cosmetically customize part of a base or vehicle
Return home from an expedition, sort items through logistics, refuel, and prep for the next trip
